import os
os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'
os.environ['TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE'] = '1'
from transformers import CLIPModel, CLIPProcessor
print\('Loading CLIP model...'\)
model = CLIPModel.from_pretrained\('openai/clip-vit-base-patch32', local_files_only=True\)
processor = CLIPProcessor.from_pretrained\('openai/clip-vit-base-patch32', local_files_only=True\)
print\('CLIP loaded!'\)
import torch
inputs = processor\(text=['hello world'], return_tensors='pt', padding=True\)
with torch.no_grad\(\):
    text_emb = model.get_text_features\(**inputs\)
print\(f'Text embedding dim: {text_emb.shape}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'face_recognition'\)
from face_recognition_ov import FaceRecognitionOV

fr = FaceRecognitionOV\(\)
fr.initialize\(
    model_dir='face_recognition/models/intel',
    fd_model_path='face_recognition/models/intel/face-detection-retail-0004/FP32/face-detection-retail-0004.xml',
    lm_model_path='face_recognition/models/intel/landmarks-regression-retail-0009/FP32/landmarks-regression-retail-0009.xml',
    reid_model_path='face_recognition/models/intel/face-reidentification-retail-0095/FP32/face-reidentification-retail-0095.xml',
\)

import glob
for img in glob.glob\('dataset/*'\):
    results = fr.infer\(img\)
    print\(f'{img}: {len\(results\)} face\(s\)'\)
    for r in results:
        print\(f'  bbox={r[\\"bbox\\"]}, confidence \(implicit from detector threshold\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/Users/53422/.conda/envs/image/python.exe -c "
import json
from image_search_app.db import get_session, PersonRecord, ImageRecord
from image_search_app.vector.chroma_store import ChromaStore
from sqlalchemy import select

store = ChromaStore\(\)

with get_session\(\) as s:
    for img in s.scalars\(select\(ImageRecord\)\):
        for p in img.people:
            if p.descriptor and '0002' in img.file_path:
                desc = json.loads\(p.descriptor\)
                result = store.face_collection.query\(query_embeddings=[desc], n_results=1\)
                print\(f'0002 face query: distance={result[\\"distances\\"][0][0]:.4f}, name={result[\\"metadatas\\"][0][0][\\"name\\"]}'\)
                print\(f'Current threshold: 0.6'\)
" 2>&1)
